svg.title: Aji conversation flow diagram
svg.desc: Flowchart showing how Aji handles a distressed user from greeting through triage, guided questions, and resolution paths

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How should Aji greet a distressed user?')
sendPrompt('How does Aji detect emotional state from voice?')
sendPrompt('What does guided mode look like for Aji?')
sendPrompt('What does direct query mode look like for Aji?')
sendPrompt('What does the Aji resolution response look like?')
sendPrompt('What format does Aji use to deliver its response?')
sendPrompt('How does Aji handle follow-up questions?')
